name: Chromium
description: Adds chromium launchers that run Chrome inside the Puppeteer container image.

image.description: Container image used to run Chrome.

platform.description: Docker platform used for the browser container. Use empty string to omit --platform.

sandbox.description: Browser sandbox mode. 'off' passes --no-sandbox --disable-setuid-sandbox to launcher commands (recommended for many devcontainer runtimes).
